'''Vondrel''' was a [[City/Legends|city]] located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Meastrinnar]] and a sister city to the similarly-named [[Vondrol]]. An insurgency against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] took root on Meastrinnar at the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. During the [[Pacification of Meastrinnar|pacification]] campaign that the Empire undertook against this rebellion, the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] discovered a group of [[Spy/Legends|spies]] affiliated with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] who were operating in Vondrol.

A squad of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] led by [[Vin Northal/Legends|Vin Northal]] was ordered to eliminate the cell, but the ISB transmission was incorrectly decoded. This particular development resulted in the stormtroopers conducting a raid against an orphanage in Vondrel. Because they had been ordered to kill every living being within the structure and were relying solely on [[Infrared/Legends|infrared]] [[Sensor/Legends|sensors]], Northal and his men killed dozens of sleeping children before they realized what they were doing. Upon recognizing this, Northal ordered an immediate withdrawal, but the media networks portrayed the raid on the orphanage as a victory for the Empire despite what the stormtroopers had done. The reaction of Northal's superiors was similar in nature, however, the debacle ultimately resulted in Northal's decision to leave the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Military]] for the Alliance.
